commit_scope: Teach deploy settling to dispatch the current main SHA when the latest Hostinger run targets an older main SHA.

local_validation.notes: The stale-target test proves that when main is e2e0645a56a982b9460754f90b6755e47e348d8e and the latest Hostinger run targets older e1283a7f7c237fd07e156127754b1b7b7b03c000, the settle command dispatches a deploy for the current target once and then waits. Hostinger API observation found VM 1482815 running at 187.77.152.42, project coherence-network alive with api/web/pulse/db containers up, and no managed public keys reported by the provider API.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Manual current-main Hostinger deploy run 26892572855 for e2e0645a56a982b9460754f90b6755e47e348d8e failed at Sync tracked deploy script to VPS after ssh-keyscan failed five times and eight scp attempts to root@187.77.152.42 timed out. After the VPS reboot, Hostinger action 97434868 ct_restart succeeded at 2026-06-03T14:29:33Z and public health restarted at 2026-06-03T14:29:48Z, but still reports deployed_sha 5dad3d6f0d7f48495b9644fde0e8d26572962ae1. Local TCP to 187.77.152.42:22 succeeds while ssh-keyscan returns rc=1 with no host key.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Deploy settling no longer waits forever on an older Hostinger run when main advances outside the Hostinger Auto Deploy path filter; it dispatches the current main SHA once.
test_flows: After Hostinger SSH accepts GitHub-runner connections: scripts/settle_public_deploy.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com https://coherencycoin.com

phase_gate.reason: The stale-target dispatch behavior is locally proven, but public production remains behind main until Hostinger SSH/SCP succeeds.

evidence_refs: scripts/settle_public_deploy.sh dispatches the current main SHA when the latest Hostinger run targets an older SHA.
Hostinger Auto Deploy run 26892572855 failed at the same ssh-keyscan/scp timeout gate as the earlier e1283a7f runs.
Hostinger API reports VM 1482815 running, Docker project coherence-network alive, and no provider-managed public keys attached.
